name: cxr542-ai
description: AI learning hub — catalog and experiment demos

scripts.build:hub: npm run build:intros && npm run build:catalog
scripts.deploy:experiments: node scripts/deploy-project.mjs react_test && node scripts/deploy-project.mjs markdown-editor && node scripts/deploy-project.mjs next.js_test
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:experiments && npm run deploy:notes && npm run deploy:ppt-academizer && npm run deploy:edu-team-tms && npm run deploy:ai-synapse-wiki
